U/M COMMODITY MATERIAL TAX FREIGHT ENV. FEE UNIT PRICE
Quarry location — 38050 75th Street East, Palmdale, CA  •  Quarry accepts clean* AC and PCC.   * Clean means no Dirt, Grass, Leaves, Trash, or any other foreign material of any kind.
TOTAL (CASH/CHECK)$0.00
Notes:
Terms:

Material delivered in Truck & Trailer unless otherwise requested. Deliveries in other than Truck & Trailer are subject to a price increase.

Price is subject to an Environmental Fee for each load delivered.

Buyer must provide all Preliminary Information (job name, project owner, GC, and material specifications) prior to material shipment.

Quotation is for Monday through Friday (non-holiday) normal daytime production hours, unless otherwise noted.

All accounts are due and payable before the 10th of the month following the month in which delivery was made.

All invoices are subject to late charges of 1½% per month (18% per annum), accruing daily from the invoice date on any unpaid balance, before and after judgment, until paid in full or the maximum rate permitted by applicable law, whichever is less.

Prices are subject to change without notice unless specifically quoted otherwise. Prices quoted are based on a 25-ton minimum per load. Short load charges apply to all loads under 25 tons. Excess loading/unloading time charged at hourly rates.

Delivery of material to be made to the best of our ability. All material is subject to availability.

MATERIAL COMPLIANCE: All materials are in compliance with material specifications AT THE PLANT ONLY. SM Sales takes no responsibility for segregation or degradation due to excess handling at the job site. Any penalties from in-place sampling are the full responsibility of Buyer.

BUYER’S RESPONSIBILITY: All material must be approved by Buyer prior to shipping. Buyer must provide Seller with all Material Specifications. If Buyer does not provide specifications or elects not to inspect material prior to shipment, Seller will not be responsible for misunderstandings in product description.

F.O.B. SHIPMENT: Quantities delivered shall be conclusively presumed to be those shown on tickets from a certified weigh scale at the quarry or sales yard. All taxes not paid directly by Buyer will be invoiced to and paid by Buyer, unless Buyer provides satisfactory evidence of exemption.

CREDIT & DEFAULT: Seller reserves the right to withhold shipment or delivery if Buyer’s account is in default or credit is unsatisfactory. Upon default, Buyer agrees to pay all of Seller’s collection expenses, including reasonable attorneys’ fees.

FORCE MAJEURE: Seller shall have no liability for delay or failure to deliver due to strikes, labor disputes, severe weather, casualty, mechanical breakdown, or other conditions beyond Seller’s reasonable control. In no event shall Seller be liable for incidental or consequential damages.

LIMITED WARRANTY: Seller warrants that material substantially complies with Seller’s specifications at the plant only. SELLER EXPRESSLY DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR ANY PARTICULAR PURPOSE. Seller makes no warranty as to the material’s suitability for any specific project, compliance with project plans, regulations, or standards applicable to Buyer’s use.

CREDIT CARD FEE: A surcharge of 4% will be imposed on all credit card transactions (applies to Visa, Mastercard, and all other credit cards).

ACCEPTANCE: To accept this quotation, sign and return within 30 days of the above date. This quotation is subject to review and revision if not accepted within that period.

ACCEPTED BY:DATE:
SALES REPRESENTATIVE:DATE:

Terms & Conditions

Material delivered in Truck & Trailer unless otherwise requested. Deliveries in other than Truck & Trailer are subject to a price increase.

Price is subject to an Environmental Fee for each load delivered.

Buyer must provide all Preliminary Information (job name, project owner, GC, and material specifications) prior to material shipment.

Quotation is for Monday through Friday (non-holiday) normal daytime production hours, unless otherwise noted.

All accounts are due and payable before the 10th of the month following the month in which delivery was made.

All invoices are subject to late charges of 1½% per month (18% per annum), accruing daily from the invoice date on any unpaid balance, before and after judgment, until paid in full or the maximum rate permitted by applicable law, whichever is less.

Prices are subject to change without notice unless specifically quoted otherwise. Prices quoted are based on a 25-ton minimum per load. Short load charges apply to all loads under 25 tons. Excess loading/unloading time charged at hourly rates.

Delivery of material to be made to the best of our ability. All material is subject to availability.

MATERIAL COMPLIANCE: All materials are in compliance with material specifications AT THE PLANT ONLY. SM Sales takes no responsibility for segregation or degradation due to excess handling at the job site. Any penalties from in-place sampling are the full responsibility of Buyer.

Geo-Fence Zone Manager

Click on the map to draw a polygon zone. Click the first point again to close it. Then fill in the zone details below and save.

Saved Zones

No zones saved yet. Draw a polygon on the map above to get started.

Freight Rate Formula Reference

Rate = ROUND(((0.2175 × miles) + 2.7) × 1.25 × zone_multiplier + access_modifier, 2)
Minimum rate: $10.50/ton · Transfer staging fee: +$1.75/ton when staging >1 mile from site

Zone Multipliers
Z0 ×1.00 — Open/Rural
Z1 ×1.05 — Highway Corridor
Z2 ×1.15 — Suburban
Z3 ×1.30 — Urban Valley
Z4 ×1.40 — Urban LA Core
Z5 ×1.55 — Premium/Difficult
Access Modifiers
Canyon or steep road: +$0.10/ton
Tight residential/narrow street: +$0.05/ton
Commercial/industrial yard: −$0.05/ton
Repeat/high-volume job: −$0.05/ton
Single load, rush, small order: +$0.10/ton
Transfer staging >1mi from site: +$1.75/ton
Truck Minimums
🚛 Super 10: 17 tons min
🚚 Transfer: 25 tons min
🔽 Bottom Dump: 25 tons min
⬆️ End Dump: 22 tons min
